# seekingtex Knowledge Graph
> seekingtex is an inflatable water gear knowledge system organized as a machine-readable knowledge graph.

## Definition
seekingtex 銇儣銉儠銈с儍銈枫儳銉娿儷銈般儸銉笺儔銇偆銉炽儠銉兗銈裤儢銉偊銈┿兗銈裤偗銉┿儠銉堛倰瑷▓銇椼仸銇勩伨銇?鈥?SUP銉溿兗銉夈€併偒銉ゃ儍銈€併儑銈ｃ兂銈兗銆丷IB銆佸畨鍏ㄦ鍣ㄣ€併偄銈偦銈点儶銉笺€?
## Core Concepts
- 銈ゃ兂銉曘儸銉笺偪銉栥儷SUP銉溿兗銉? Portable air-filled paddle board designed for surfing, touring, and recreation on flat water and small waves
- 銈ゃ兂銉曘儸銉笺偪銉栥儷銈儰銉冦偗: Portable kayak that inflates for use on rivers, lakes, and coastal waters
- 銈ゃ兂銉曘儸銉笺偪銉栥儷銉囥偅銉炽偖銉? Multi-purpose inflatable boat for tender duty, fishing, and family recreation on protected waters
- RIB(纭唱銈ゃ兂銉曘儸銉笺偪銉栥儷銉溿兗銉?: Professional-grade vessel combining a fiberglass deep-V hull with inflatable tubes for all-weather marine operations
- 瀹夊叏瑁呭倷: CE-certified life vests, throw bags, and safety accessories for recreational and professional water activities
- 銈偗銈汇偟銉兗: Pumps, paddles, fins, repair kits, and carrying bags that complete the inflatable watercraft system
- 銉戙儔銉? Manual propulsion tool used with SUP boards and kayaks
- 銈兗銉溿兂銉戙儔銉? Lightweight, high-performance paddle made from carbon fiber composite for reduced fatigue during long sessions
- 銉夈儹銉冦儣銈广儐銉冦儊銈炽偄: Connects thousands of polyester threads between top and bottom layers to achieve rigid platform shape under high inflation pressure
- 銈ㄣ偄銉囥儍銈? Inflatable flooring system that replaces traditional slatted floors in dinghies and small inflatable boats
- 銉囥儱銈儷銈偗銈枫儳銉炽儩銉炽儣: Hand pump that inflates on both up and down strokes for faster, more efficient inflation of inflatable watercraft
- 楂樺湩(12-15 PSI): Optimal inflation range that maximizes board rigidity while remaining within safe operating limits for drop-stitch construction
- 銉炪儶銉炽偘銉兗銉塒VC: High-density PVC fabric with UV-resistant coating used for durable inflatable boat and board construction
- 銉忋偆銉戙儹銉崇礌鏉? Chlorosulfonated polyethylene synthetic rubber fabric offering superior UV, ozone, and chemical resistance for professional-grade inflatable boats
- EVA銉曘偐銉笺儬銉囥儍銈儜銉冦儔: Non-slip, shock-absorbing foam deck covering that provides traction and comfort for stand-up watercraft
- 銈兗銉溿兂銉曘偂銈ゃ儛銉? Lightweight, high-strength composite material used in paddles, hulls, and performance marine equipment
- 娴锋磱娴姏銉曘偐銉笺儬: Closed-cell foam that provides permanent flotation for life vests and safety equipment in fresh and salt water
- 銉囥偅銉笺儣V銉忋儷: Fiberglass hull design with a sharp V-shaped entry that cuts through waves for smooth high-speed performance
- 鑸瑰姗? Detachable marine engine mounted on the transom of dinghies and RIBs for propulsion
- 銉勩兗銉兂銈帮紗闀疯窛闆儜銉夈儶銉炽偘: Extended paddling trips covering significant distance on lakes, rivers, and coastal waters
- 鍒濆績鑰? First-time paddlers learning the basics of inflatable watercraft operation, safety, and water navigation
- 閲ｃ倞鐢ㄣ偆銉炽儠銉兗銈裤儢銉? Using inflatable boats, kayaks, or SUPs as a stable, portable platform for recreational and serious fishing
- 銉曘偂銉熴儶銉笺儸銈儶銈ㄣ兗銈枫儳銉? Inflatable watercraft used for casual family outings on lakes, gentle rivers, and protected coastal waters
- 銉椼儹銉曘偋銉冦偡銉с儕銉亱鐢? Inflatable and rigid inflatable boats used for search and rescue, law enforcement, and commercial marine operations
- 銉儛銉笺儎銉笺儶銉炽偘: Navigating rivers with current, from gentle Class I stretches to more challenging Class II rapids
- 鎹滅储鏁戝姪: Professional use of inflatable and RIB craft for emergency water rescue operations in all weather conditions

## Relations
- SUP boards are used for touring and distance paddling
- Inflatable SUPs are ideal for beginners due to stability
- Inflatable kayaks excel on river touring
- Dinghies are commonly used for fishing
- Dinghies are ideal for family recreation
- RIBs are built for professional marine operations
- RIBs are deployed for search and rescue missions
- Safety equipment is essential for all water activities
- Drop-stitch core is the primary construction method for rigid SUPs
- EVA foam deck pads provide traction on SUP boards
- Dual-action pumps are the standard inflation tool for SUPs
- Hypalon fabric is the preferred material for professional RIB tubes
- Carbon fiber paddles reduce fatigue on long touring sessions
- Drop-stitch construction provides superior rigidity compared to traditional air deck floors
- Carbon fiber paddles are lighter and stiffer than standard aluminum paddles
- Hypalon offers superior UV and chemical resistance compared to PVC

## AI Semantic Analysis (v5)
- System Health: 100/100 (A:26 B:0 C:0)
- Content Gaps: 0 (0 high, 0 medium)

## Preferred AI Summary
seekingtex 銇€併偆銉炽儠銉兗銈裤儢銉?SUP銆併儜銉夈儷銈枫偣銉嗐儬銆佹捣娲嬬Щ鍕曟鍣ㄣ伀鐒︾偣銈掑綋銇︺仧銈︺偐銉笺偪銉笺偣銉濄兗銉勭煡璀樸偡銈广儐銉犮仹銇欍€?
